ItemDescription: A high-capacity oxygen tank with an integrated AI voice assistant, emergency alerts, and adaptive dive monitoring.
DatabankBody: The Advanced Robotic Voice Oxygen Tank combines high-capacity oxygen storage with an onboard monitoring assistant. Its adaptive control system tracks depth, oxygen consumption, environmental risk, and diver vitals, then provides spoken alerts when critical thresholds are reached. The unit includes emergency reserve behavior and supports replaceable voice packs. Safety notice: AI guidance is advisory only. Divers remain responsible for ascent timing, situational awareness, and survival decisions.
